name: lockdrift
description: Offline JavaScript lockfile drift and supply-chain facts auditor.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan fixtures/npm-drift --out /tmp/lockdrift-smoke.md && node dist/cli.js scan fixtures/pnpm-workspace --format json --fail-on high > /tmp/lockdrift-smoke.json && node dist/cli.js explain fixtures/npm-drift/package-lock.json --package left-pad
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
